text.title: plan-execute-vs-react Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for plan-execute-vs-react as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Loop wanders; no human can review trajectory. Add a planning step up front.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Plan is invented blind; first step's reality breaks the rest. Use ReAct or hybrid replan.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Infinite loops on bad tool output. Always cap turns; surface "stuck" as a result.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Confusing trace; plan changes mid-run. Separate the calls: plan first, execute second.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Same as ReAct but more expensive. Replan ONLY on failure or contradiction.
